title: My Project
subtitle: one-line description of what you're building · source of truth: ROADMAP.md
loop: Optional narrative line — the core loop, the wedge, or the rule your product runs on.

cards.title: The first foundational thing
cards.summary: What this slice does, in 1–2 sentences. Rocks are the load-bearing, risky, or must-be-right work that everything else depends on.
cards.done: A concrete, testable definition of done for this slice.

cards.title: A user-facing feature
cards.summary: Pebbles are real features users touch. Keep summaries dense — one screen of value per card.
cards.done: What the user can do when this is finished.

cards.title: Some glue or polish
cards.summary: Sand fills the gaps: config, tests, small fixes, polish. Cheap, deferrable, not load-bearing.

shipped.title: Something already done
shipped.summary: Shipped cards appear in a collapsed section at the bottom, dimmed. Move a card here when it lands.
